7+40/200. This is the 7th Navamsa of Taurus sign, which is
the first quarter of Mrigasira N akshatra. Thus it becomes clear
that in the lunar month ofPhalguna (i.e. Sun in Cancer sign)
when Moon is in Mrigasira Nakshatra 1st quarter birth will
take place. Now to clarify the time of birth and whether birth
would be at day or night, I am providing an example -Think
that the Lagna longitude at the time of intercourse was 9s I 0°
25' 0". That is, the Lagna is in Capricorn sign. The 4th sign
from Capricorn (considering that the Moon's dwadasamsa
was 4th) is Aries. Aries is a sign that becomes strong at night,
and therefore birth will take place at night. Now let us find
out time at which birth will take place on that day night.
Removing the complete dwadasamsa from Lagna longitude
the remainder is 25'. Let us think that the duration of night
for that date was 28 Ghati. One navamsa = 3° 20' = 200'.

706 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
